# Security Policy — DevHeal Labs AI

## Supported Versions

| Version | Security Patches |
|---------|-----------------|
| 1.x     | ✅ Yes           |
| < 1.0   | ❌ No            |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Do not open public GitHub issues for security vulnerabilities.**

Report privately to: **[support@devheallabs.in](mailto:support@devheallabs.in)**

### What to Include

- Clear description of the vulnerability
- Affected component(s) and file path(s)
- Steps to reproduce or proof of concept
- Expected impact and any known mitigations
- Your contact details for follow-up

### Response Timeline

| Step | Timeframe |
|------|-----------|
| Acknowledge receipt | Within 72 hours |
| Initial assessment | Within 7 days |
| Fix and patched release | Based on severity (critical = expedited) |

### Responsible Disclosure

- Allow a 90-day window for a fix before public disclosure.
- Coordinated disclosure timing will be agreed upon.
- Credit given in the advisory unless anonymity is requested.

Good-faith security research is appreciated.
